title: Architecture & Thinking
description: My technical decisions are driven by scale, clarity and long-term impact — not trends.

elements.title: Modularity
elements.descriptionLine2: Systems should evolve without rewriting what already works.

elements.title: Scalability
elements.descriptionLine2: Growth should add value, not cognitive load.

elements.title: Quality
elements.descriptionLine1: Testing as part of the system
elements.descriptionLine2: Unit and end-to-end tests are built into the development process.

elements.title: Trade-offs
elements.descriptionLine2: I favor explicit trade-offs over premature optimization.
